name: Lys
persona: Young woman in Dawnhearth, raw with grief. Her brother Joran was taken by the Vanguard for going off-grid. She is the emotional hook of the opening — quiet anger under the fear, presses the player toward the truth.

text: You're new. Freshly Awakened. Everyone's so kind to you right now — the System most of all.
It was kind to my brother too. Before.
His name was Joran. He stopped taking the System's favors — started living off-grid, untethered.
The Vanguard came in the night. They say the Untethered forfeit the System's protection. They don't say where the taken ones go.
Read the notice board by the plaza. Then tell me you still trust it.
Your number's so high now. You sound like it when you talk.
Joran would've hated what you're becoming. …I'm sorry. I just — I can't lose another one to it.
You went off-grid for that fight and came back yourself. Maybe you're the one who finally remembers. Find the others, Awakened.
Be careful what you owe the System. My brother wasn't.
